## HOOK
# The Quiet Civic Crisis ## Book Narrative Public conversations about community issues increasingly happen online — often in fragmented spaces that rarely translate into real-world collaboration.

## REALITY
Participation has shifted away from the places where decisions are actually made. And when participation fades, something predictable happens.
